description: This Java class defines a REST controller for a Spring Boot application, providing basic endpoints such as welcome message, API documentation redirect, health check, and application info.

classes.name: HelloController
classes.description: Spring Boot REST controller providing basic endpoints for service information, documentation redirect, health check, and welcome message.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Returns a welcome message for the application.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Redirects to Swagger UI using request data to preserve scheme, host, and port.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Provides a simple health check response indicating the application is operational.
